item.description: Dedicated to my nasty haters that invented that I was trans because I chose not to have children. I have bad news for you I am not trans but I respect their choice. I am just a woman making my own decisions. Must be terrible to be such an incel. Get a life. Lol.
item.dc:creator: JustitiaRuatCaelum

item.title: screaming into the void? yelling for help?
item.description: Throw away account. Half screaming into the void, half asking for help. I am a MA resident, and as the meme says, I'm voting for the first time in my life. I have questions about my mail-in ballot that I can't find satisfactory answers to on google, and I am the only one in my family who isn't a MAGAt. If there are any fellow blue MA residents out there, I'd really appreciate a dm so I can throw a few questions at you. I do not want this to get to the FP, I don't care about points, I'm just looking for a nudge in the right direction.
item.dc:creator: randomkeyboardsmash

item.dc:creator: Iullyiullyus

item.title: Dr. Alan Hart TB Pioneer AND Trans Pioneer.
item.description: Full Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C0scA7VN01Z/?igsh=OWVmbzNnZHpwa3By Extra sauce: https://connecticuthistory.org/alan-l-hart-pioneer-in-medicine-and-transgender-history/ 'Alan L. Hart was a 20th-century physician, radiologist, and author who pioneered the use of x-ray in early detection for tuberculosis. He spent the latter part of his career in Connecticut working for the state’s Tuberculosis Commission to expand public health screenings and services. Hart was also one of the first people to undergo gender affirmation surgery in the United States.' Mor sauce: https://www.opb.org/article/2022/06/30/oregon-us-gender-affirming-surgery-history-dr-alan-hart-lgbtqia-history/ 'It was 105 years ago that an Oregon doctor underwent what is thought to be the first documented gender-confirming surgery in the United States. Dr. Alan Hart was born Alberta “Lucille” Hart in 1890. Hart grew up in the Willamette Valley and attended Albany College, now Lewis & Clark College. Hart preferred to present as male and did so as much as possible – often with family support. But at school, Hart was forced to wear dresses and appear as “Lucille.”
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: We call that email herpes
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Mission Accomplished!
item.description: I am so excited to have finally finished! What was supposed to take two years took an extra six months due to some unsavory personal reasons, but it's done! Yay! I do still have to wait for my final grades, but I'm sure mu work was good enough that I'll definitely pass this last class. Then it's time to update the resume and seen if I can land a better job. Not particularly looking forward to that thanks to all the horror stories I've seen about job hunting here, but I am currently employed at a job where I have a good team so I can be patient and wait for the right door to open. Edit: Hello again, Front Page. Fancy meeting you here. Stay weird, everyone!
item.dc:creator: Thisisallyourfault

item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: Fuck cancer
item.description: I apologize if this is long-winded, but I'm posting about my friend, who is very important to me. We met nine years ago when I accidentally added her on Facebook. She lived close, and after chatting for a few weeks, we finally got to meet! It was like we had known each other forever. She is the definition of a true friend. She's always there if you need to talk and never judges. She always makes sure everyone is included and is just a positive light that you don't come across nowadays. In September 2023, Cynthia was having issues eating. She was choking and having difficulty swallowing. I took her to Urgent Care, where they assumed it was esophagitis but still referred her to get an endoscopy. Fast forward, and the results are in: Stage 3 esophageal squamous cell carcinoma, cancer. She's never smoked or used drugs, but cancer does what it wants, I suppose She had to have a feeding tube installed and go through chemo and radiation. She endured radiation burns all over her neck and chest and lost all her hair, which she obsesses over. Cynthia is also disabled and legally blind, leaving her to rely on transportation service to take her to and from appointments. One of the drivers was rushing her and didn't buckle her in and slammed on brakes, which threw her forward into a support rail, ripping out her feeding tube and leaving her in more pain. She had to wait days to get her feeding tube replaced and it was so painful for her not even her morphine medication helped. She started to be able to eat without issue, and we were so excited! Like, yes, it's working!!!! But unfortunately, not ? She finally had her scan last week, and it was truly devastating. The cancer has spread to her liver, right lung, and adrenal gland. I know shit happens, but WHY to such an amazing, genuine person like Cynthia, who has struggled her entire life only to get a diagnosis of cancer and that it's spreading ??? To whoever reads this, thank you ❤️ I'm not great at writing or expressing emotions, but I felt I needed to post for her and include her GoFundMe. https://gofund.me/85e9f402 Edit: Thank you everyone for the kind words and those who donated. Cynthia hasn't messaged me yet this morning, but I know when she sees her GoFundMe and comments she is going to be in tears ❤️
item.dc:creator: Sleepies

item.title: Images of Note: oh no my brain
item.description:
Fun fact: it's Canon that Soval was terrified of the Humans because 1: they were making such fast progress in technology, and 2: they reminded him of Ancient Vulcans.
Why the fuck do I ship them now fuck sake!
That laugh is the laugh at the start of Crazy Train btw.
I keep saying: If we didn't need to sleep capitalism would force us to work non stop. Now they think they found a way to make us work in our sleep.
The "You're not that guy" scene in the expanse was the fucking best scene in all of Sci-fi and action.
"Old Soul" means "wow, you're only 10 and you used up all your serotonin."
I dreamt I could buy weed in a shop, why you having wild meme dreams
Britain's already up to some bullshit, don't give it ideas. The only thing between Britain going all irredentist and invading France (and other countries) is the fact France both has nukes and is part of NATO.
:(
(When someone who's a Fascist for Pay meets someone who's a Fascist out of ideology.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It only took my company 3 years to run me into the ground
item.description: There's absolutely no work life balance and we're expected to "make sacrifices for the good of the team". Last I checked, my paycheck says 40 hours on it but constantly working 55+ a week. Sorry for the rant. I love you all
item.dc:creator: Longdickjohnson69

item.title: Meme Dump 12 out of 200
item.description:
Hi ~ I'm back with another 11k cleaning out meme folder dump ! I posted this yesterday but it got marked as mature. So I deleted it and am posting it again today lol
Going to do a little testing on skipping a bunch of descriptions for the memes. It says more likely to go most viral with a descriptions for each one - but a few people have commented saying that's not needed anymore.
So instead of rambling pointless thoughts [and hoping you guys don't read it] I'm going to type a little here and there.
To be honest, I have a few meme posts forcefully marked as "mature" and I'm not sure why? Or why this one was marked that way too
I just want to share silly memes during some weird and dark worldly times. Give people that brief escape
This weekend was busy but fun! Hope everyone else had a decent weekend too
Happy Sunday everyone ♡ hope you have a lovely sleep ! See you tomorrow for another meme dump ~
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Mama cat and her wiggly little potatoes
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Some companies are just shit
item.description: She's in Florida, company is in Texas. Suing their asses for ADA discrimination is probably impractical and would cost her more emotional labor at this point than it would be worth, even if she could find an attorney who would work on contingency. She'll apply for unemployment and keep on looking for something better, but fuck companies like this. In the ass. With a sharp, dry cactus. MV Edit: Grateful for the support and advice. Will, as the legal eagles say, "take it under advisement" and discuss the matter with our daughter. Please vote Blue forever, everywhere; in the long run, this will strengthen workers' rights and unionization which exists to counter this kind of corporate bullshit. To those saying she was just a bad employee and the two things are not related, the chain of events is undisputed. All was syncopetic until she told her supervisor that she had occasional seizures. She was immediately locked out of system access and told to wait for a company decision. It came this morning, and she was instructed to return her company computer at once. Up until then, things had been going well.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni

item.title: JamJar the skunk is not happy with being put on a diet
item.dc:creator: tampacl
